# CWE-653: Improper Isolation or Compartmentalization (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-653-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
	"strings"
)

type AuditLog struct {
	ID      int    `json:"id"`
	Message string `json:"message"`
}

var sharedAuditStore []AuditLog

// Vulnerable: public and admin routes share the same privileged data store.
func PublicSearch(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	q := r.URL.Query().Get("q")
	var out []AuditLog
	for _, row := range sharedAuditStore {
		if q == "" || strings.Contains(row.Message, q) {
			out = append(out, row)
		}
	}
	w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
	_ = json.NewEncoder(w).Encode(out)
}

func AdminPurge(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	sharedAuditStore = nil
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
}
